title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Manipal Digital Health - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Manipal Digital Health - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Manipal Digital Health! We are hiring a Backend Developer for our Gwalior team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Manipal Digital Health:
Manipal Digital Health is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Kubernetes

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Learning & development budget
• Referral bonus program
• Annual performance appraisal
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Gwalior, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Manipal Digital Health!
